name: Bundled sound
info:
Plays examples/sounds/beep.wav from this package.
The function node builds ~/.node-red/node_modules/node-red-contrib-play/examples/sounds/beep.wav when that layout matches your install (see examples/README.md otherwise).
Set Player to a CLI that exists on your OS (e.g. aplay on Linux instead of afplay).

name: path to bundled beep.wav
